title: SCBE Chemistry 0.5B QLoRA v6 Scaffolded Marker Gate
description: v6: same data + same eval contract as v5; max_steps lifted 180->320 to test whether more training moves raw pass rate (v5 raw 1/5, scaffolded 5/5). Push gated on executable promotion gate, not on training metrics.
system_prompt: You are an SCBE-AETHERMOORE chemistry verification agent. Answer in concise English. Preserve every REQUIRED_MARKERS word exactly. Then explain the chemistry path and governance verdict. Use PASS only for valid chemistry routes and DENY for invalid material chemistry claims.
notes: v6 = v5 + 78% more steps (180->320) and slightly longer warmup (16->24) to give marker behavior time to internalize without scaffolding.
Same dataset, eval contract, and base model as v5. The only training-side variable is step count.

If v6 raw pass rate moves from 1/5 toward 3/5 or better, the scale-up budget unlocks for a 1.5B base in v7. If raw stays at v5 floor, the limitation is data not steps and v7 should rebuild marker shards instead.
T4-safe settings preserved: sequence length 384, per-device batch size 1, accumulation 8, gate max_new_tokens 96. Timeout 35m -> 55m to absorb the longer step count.
push_adapter remains false. Per the no-publish-until-it-works rule: dispatch v6, run gate locally on the produced adapter, then publish manually only if gate clears.
aligned_foundations_v2 OOD anchor preserved (~11% of train rows) to keep concept-preservation guard active.
Different seed (46 -> 47) so v6 is not a bit-identical re-run of v5; if results match exactly, that itself is information about the trainer not the data.
